channel.title: TACO | Trump Always Chickens Out
channel.description: A live-data daily tracker of market pressure, financial stress, and TACO-style retreat conditions.

item.title: 2026-03-31 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 25.57
item.description: New daily signal for 2026-03-31: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 25.57/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
